title: YO17 8DG, Mr Nigel Lee, Mrs Joanne Lee and Mr Harry Lee: environmental permit issued - EPR/VP3927SX
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr Nigel Lee, Mrs Joanne Lee and Mr Harry Lee Installation name: Linton Wold Farm Permit number: EPR/VP3927SX  "
